title: cyclorhiza major
intro: Cyclorhiza major is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclorhiza major include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against microbial infections. Herbal preparations of Cyclorhiza major include extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
